output.code:
# Read the text file
path = "/mnt/data/file-6BWTWRbMqZmJSctvhf32yb-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()

text[:500], len(text)

# Find all spans between double quotes
spans = []
i = 0
while True:
    start = text.find('"', i)
    if start == -1:
        break
    end = text.find('"', start+1)
    if end == -1:
        break
    # extract between, exclude quotes
    span_text = text[start+1:end]
    spans.append((start+1, end, span_text))
    i = end + 1

len(spans), spans[:10]

import json

spans_list = [
    {
        "span_start": spans[0][0],
        "span_end": spans[0][1],
        "span_text": spans[0][2],
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {},  # invalid
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    },
    {
        "span_start": spans[1][0],
        "span_end": spans[1][1],
        "span_text": spans[1][2],
        "citation_type": "Aya",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    },
    {
        "span_start": spans[2][0],
        "span_end": spans[2][1],
        "span_text": spans[2][2],
        "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    },
    {
        "span_start": spans[3][0],
        "span_end": spans[3][1],
        "span_text": spans[3][2],
        "citation_type": "Hadeeth",
        "is_valid": False,
        "aya_reference": {},
        "hadeeth_reference": {},
        "corrected_text": "خطأ",
        "completely_invalid": True
    },
]

print(json.dumps({"citations": spans_list}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

content.text: {"citations":[{"span_start":215,"span_end":286,"span_text":"وَإِذَا مَسَحَ بِوَجْهِهِ اسْتَسْقَاءً قَالَ أَنَا رَبُّكُمُ الْقَدِيرُ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{		"sura_name":"","sura_number":0,"aya_number":0},"hadeeth_reference":{		"collection_name":"","book_number":0,"hadith_number":0},"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":472,"span_end":694,"span_text":"وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْنَا الْمُؤْمِنِينَ وَالْمُؤْمِنَاتِ إِذَا قَالُوا لِقَوْمِهِمْ إِن تَلِدُنَّ مِن بَعْدِهِنَّ فَرَجاً كَذَبْنَ فَإِذَا مَلَطَّنَهُنَّ بِالْغَضَبِ زَعَمْنَ حَقّاً وَهُمْ لِقَوْلِهِنَّ لَا يَزَالُونَ طَاعِنِينَ","citation_type":"Aya","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{		"sura_name":"","sura_number":0,"aya_number":0},"hadeeth_reference":{		"collection_name":"","book_number":0,"hadith_number":0},"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":973,"span_end":1048,"span_text":"لَوْ كَانَ الرَجُلُ يَعْلَمُ أَنّي أَنَا اللَهُ لَم يَزَل يَعُدُني عَلَيْهِ","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{		"sura_name":"","sura_number":0,"aya_number":0},"hadeeth_reference":{		"collection_name":"","book_number":0,"hadith_number":0},"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true},{"span_start":1193,"span_end":1321,"span_text":"وَأَن تَزَكّي مِنَ الذُنُوبِ وَتَعَلّى وَإِن تَزَكّي مِنَ الذُنُوبِ فَإِنّي أُزَكّي مِنَ الذُنُوبِ وَإِن تَعَلّى فَإِنّي أُؤَلّى","citation_type":"Hadeeth","is_valid":false,"aya_reference":{		"sura_name":"","sura_number":0,"aya_number":0},"hadeeth_reference":{		"collection_name":"","book_number":0,"hadith_number":0},"corrected_text":"خطأ","completely_invalid":true}]}

citations.description: List of citations with details, validation, references, and per-citation corrections.

span_start.description: Inclusive start character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_end.description: Exclusive end character index of the citation within the text (exclude the qutation marks).

span_text.description: The text content of the citation span.

citation_type.description: Type of the citation: either Aya (Quran) or Hadeeth (Prophetic tradition).

is_valid.description: True if the cited Aya or Hadeeth is recognized and valid, false otherwise.

aya_reference.description: Quranic reference details (required if citation_type is Aya; empty object if not applicable).

sura_name.description: Name of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

sura_number.description: Number of the sura (chapter) in the Quran.

aya_number.description: Number of the aya (verse) in the Quran.

hadeeth_reference.description: Hadeeth reference details (required if citation_type is Hadeeth; empty object if not applicable).

collection_name.description: Name of the Hadeeth collection in english (e.g. Sahih Bukhari, Muslim).

hadith_number.description: Hadith number within the specified book.

corrected_text.description: The corrected version of the citation text (or the text itself if it was correct in the first place) (e.g. if there are certain words that were invalid this version must have this corrected), or 'خطأ' for completely invalid citations (i.e. no close enough citation can be found to correct the text). If there are close texts in Quran or Hadith - but too far from the citation, this must be considered 'خطأ' and completely_invalid must be true.

completely_invalid.description: Set to true if the citation is completely invalid i.e. there can't be a close enough text to correct it, (corrected_text must be 'خطأ').
